Short Title, , , provided that:Pub. L. 117–258, § 1136 Stat. 2372Dec. 21, 2022“This Act [enacting this chapter and amending , Crimes and Criminal Procedure] may be cited as the ‘Safeguard Tribal Objects of Patrimony Act of 2021’.”section 1170 of Title 18

children.text: to carry out the trust responsibility of the United States to Indian Tribes;

to increase the maximum penalty for actions taken in violation of the Native American Graves Protection and Repatriation Act ( et seq.) (including , as added by that Act), in order to strengthen deterrence;25 U.S.C. 3001section 1170 of title 18

children.label: B
children.text: creating an export certification system; and

children.label: C
children.text: confirming the authority of the President to request from foreign nations agreements or provisional measures to prevent irremediable damage to Native American cultural heritage;

to establish a Federal framework in order to support the voluntary return by individuals and organizations of items of tangible cultural heritage, including items covered by the Native American Graves Protection and Repatriation Act ( et seq.) (including , as added by that Act) and the Archaeological Resources Protection Act of 1979 ( et seq.);25 U.S.C. 3001section 1170 of title 1816 U.S.C. 470aa

to establish an interagency working group to ensure communication between Federal agencies to successfully implement this chapter, the Native American Graves Protection and Repatriation Act ( et seq.) (including , as added by that Act), the Archaeological Resources Protection Act of 1979 ( et seq.), and other relevant Federal laws;25 U.S.C. 3001section 1170 of title 1816 U.S.C. 470aa

to establish a Native working group of Indian Tribes and Native Hawaiian organizations to assist in the implementation of this chapter, the Native American Graves Protection and Repatriation Act ( et seq.) (including , as added by that Act), the Archaeological Resources Protection Act of 1979 ( et seq.), and other relevant Federal laws;25 U.S.C. 3001section 1170 of title 1816 U.S.C. 470aa

children.label: A
children.text: information submitted by Indian Tribes or Native Hawaiian organizations pursuant to this chapter; and

children.label: B
children.text: information relating to an Item Requiring Export Certification for which an export certification was denied pursuant to this chapter; and
to encourage buyers to purchase legal contemporary art made by Native artists for commercial purposes.
